tables.html:
Cleveland ClinicTo speed the commercialization of biomarkers on inflammation and other disease areas discovered at Cleveland Clinic, including its Lerner Research Institute; Quest may independently develop test services for these biomarkers.To demonstrate the clinical and economic value of these and other biomarkers.
McKesson Specialty Health, U.S. Oncology Network and Texas OncologyTo enhance and nationally scale a model created by Med Fusion that standardizes clinical care pathways to ensure every patient receives the best possible cancer care. One example is highlighting available diagnostics, such as next-generation sequencing panels to aid therapy selection and monitoring for cancer. This approach guides the physician, according to guidelines and within an electronic health record, to a panel individualized to the patient's cancer type and stage of disease.
Arnold P. Gold FoundationTo advance humanism in healthcare. Quest is a founding member of the Gold Corporate Council.
